missions.name: Atmospheric Dropsonde Refit
missions.description: A dropsonde relay lost its parachute deployment seals after the last acid-storm pass. EVA to the satellite bus and re-seat the pyrotechnic cartridges.

missions.name: Cloud LIDAR Emitter Swap
missions.description: The high-altitude LIDAR array's emitter is drifting out of spec. Bring the new module, EVA across, and hot-swap it in place.

missions.name: Orbital Asset Servicing
missions.description: On-orbit asset is throwing faults across multiple subsystems. Diagnostics inconclusive — EVA out, find the broken parts, patch them in place.

missions.name: UV Cloud-Tracker Phasing
missions.description: The UV cloud-motion telescope drifted out of phase from sustained thermal cycling. EVA, read the wavefront sensor, walk each segment in by hand.
